steps.title: Observe square nonnegative
steps.content: $$(x+81)^2 \ge 0$$ for all real $x$, while the right side is $-256 < 0$. Therefore the equation has no real solution.

steps.title: Conclude number of solutions
steps.content: Since a square of a real number is never negative, $(x+81)^2 = -256$ cannot hold for any real $x$. Hence there are zero real solutions. That matches choice D — D is correct.
